title: Portuguese Foods
description: Adds Portuguese foods to the game
body:
This mod aims to add Portuguese foods to the game
- Pastel de Nata
- Bifana
- Francesinha
- Bola de Berlin
- And much more

This mod, in addition to adding Portuguese foods, adds a new tree to the game, which produces a new fruit, which can be used to make food. The new type of wood with a more intense color than oak, which can be used to craft stairs, slabs, etc.


**Contact me:** To find out about bug fixes, future updates, future mods and modpacks join my discord server


**Attention:** If there are any errors please contact me
